name: Millstream Area
description_short: Millstream Area Credit Union is a community-focused financial cooperative serving Ohio members with competitive loan products, digital banking, and member-centric services.
description_long:
Millstream Area Credit Union was founded on April 25, 1966, originally as Local 207 U.R.W. (United Rubber Workers) Employees Credit Union to serve Cooper Tire & Rubber Company employees and their families in Findlay, Ohio. The organization rebranded to Millstream Area Credit Union on March 13, 1984, to reflect its expanding membership beyond the original employer group. The credit union expanded to a community charter in September 2000 and further extended its service area in February 2008 to include Allen, Hardin, Putnam, Seneca, and Wood counties in Ohio.

Millstream Area Credit Union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including signature loans (as low as 9.95% APR), auto loans (as low as 4.99% APR), home equity loans (as low as 5.95% APR), home loans, and personal loans. Members can access digital banking platforms, mobile payments through CardValet, online financial calculators, educational resources, and ATM networks. The credit union provides checking and savings accounts with multiple options for different member needs, along with competitive rates and member-focused lending products.

The organization distinguishes itself through its cooperative structure built on stated values of honesty, hard work, and mutual support. Despite significant expansion from its employer-group origins to a community charter spanning six counties, the credit union emphasizes maintaining its foundational mission. The company actively engages with its communities through events like Food Truck Fridays and provides member testimonials highlighting personalized service and accessibility.

Millstream Area Credit Union is a legitimate financial institution with routing number 241278662 offering standard banking and lending services. The main considerations for prospective members are geographic service limitations (Ohio counties only) and the variability of loan rates based on individual creditworthiness. As a credit union rather than a commercial bank, membership eligibility may apply, though the community charter status suggests broad accessibility. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.99% APR
Competitive signature loan rates starting at 9.95% APR
Digital banking and mobile payment options (CardValet, mobile app)
Multiple service locations across six Ohio counties with extended hours
Member-focused approach with documented positive member reviews and personalized service
Educational resources and financial calculators available online
Routing number 241278662 indicates established banking infrastructure
cons: Service area limited to six Ohio counties (Allen, Findlay, Hardin, Putnam, Seneca, Wood)
Website contact form explicitly discourages submission of sensitive account information
Loan rates vary by creditworthiness; advertised rates are minimums and may not apply to all applicants
Limited information available about membership eligibility requirements or account opening process
No mention of online account opening or fully remote membership application
best_for: Ohio residents in Allen, Hardin, Putnam, Seneca, and Wood counties seeking traditional banking services
Borrowers with good credit looking for competitive auto and personal loan rates
Members preferring cooperative financial institutions over commercial banks
First-time homebuyers seeking mortgage guidance and home loan products
diagnosis: Millstream Area Credit Union is best for Ohio residents within its six-county service area seeking traditional banking and competitive lending products from a member-focused cooperative institution. The main caveat is geographic limitation to specific Ohio counties and variability in actual loan rates based on individual creditworthiness, with advertised rates representing only the lowest tier available.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
